what_it_does: This file is a ledger metadata record for an image asset named pitch-deck/p-14 in the design-source channel; it provides YAML frontmatter with identity, address, blob pointer, MIME type, dimensions, source label, authoring session, creation timestamp, links, and a short caption identifying it as design ground-truth.
observations: YAML frontmatter with id pitch-deck/p-14 and image://design-source/pitch-deck/p-14 address
mime is image/jpeg but w and h are both 0
source field is design_source_material and author_session is ch-3mpkjg3r
body caption reads 'SOURCE design ground-truth — pitch-deck/p-14.jpg'
standouts: Width and height are recorded as 0 for a JPEG image
The file explicitly labels the image as SOURCE design ground-truth
A blob hash is provided but no descriptive alt text or visual summary
conventions: Follows the ledger metadata schema with id, address, channel, path, blob, mime, name, w, h, source, author_session, created, and links
Uses a URI-style address scheme image://design-source/...
Separates structured frontmatter from a human-readable caption line
concerns: Image dimensions are 0x0, which is suspicious for a real image asset
links array is empty, leaving no explicit relationships
No alt text or content description beyond the filename-style caption
Blob integrity cannot be verified from the file alone
notes: A sparse ledger entry that registers a pitch-deck image as design ground-truth but lacks dimensions, links, and content description.
questions: Why are the image width and height both 0?
What visual content does pitch-deck/p-14.jpg contain?
Where is the blob physically stored and is it reachable?
Is the empty links array intentional or incomplete?
How does this page relate to other pitch-deck pages in the ledger?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose is a source design ground-truth metadata record for an image; the file does exactly that, though it is missing expected image dimensions and relationships.
intention_signals: The file appears to be trying to register a pitch-deck page image as a stable, traceable design-source artifact with a unique identity, blob reference, and authorship timestamp.
novelty: The explicit 'SOURCE design ground-truth' caption frames the image as authoritative reference material rather than a derived or processed asset.
contribution: It contributes a canonical metadata envelope for pitch-deck page 14, including a blob pointer and authorship provenance, which a fused system would keep as an asset identity record.
summary_for_embedding: A ledger metadata record for a JPEG image named pitch-deck/p-14 in the design-source channel, with a blob reference, zero dimensions, and a 'SOURCE design ground-truth' caption.
intention_for_embedding: This file was intended to catalog a pitch-deck page image as a traceable design-source ground-truth asset.
